posts.community: Ola Electric - Full Stack EV play?
posts.text: Ola guided for 40-45k sales They will be doing close to 41k sales Last 2 months sales 27.5k This month sales till June 15: 7k Another 7k and they will be closing around 41.5k , well in the guidance All this info is publicly available Check Vahaan portal Ask chat gpt Build your own conviction Verify data by yourselves

posts.author: Iamsantosh
posts.community: Ola Electric - Full Stack EV play?
posts.text: Does anyone have idea how to track daily sales? I see some people posting daily Ola Sales in X. Just curious how reliable are these numbers. I don’t think Ola will meet it’s guidance for Q1 which is their sales volume
